preamble: The shift from [a] to [ui] represents an extreme path of diphthongization involving both fronting and rounding, often through intermediate stages.

examples.note: Seen in certain Gallo-Romance dialects as a result of palatal and labial influence.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
